services.title: Everything you need to scale
services.subtitle: Three powerful services designed to take your business from data chaos to automated growth.

analytics.name: Analytics Dashboards
analytics.desc: Turn your data into decisions with embedded, branded analytics dashboards. Real-time insights tailored to your KPIs.

automation.name: Automation Workflows

ai.name: AI-Powered Tools

howItWorks.title: Simple process, powerful results
howItWorks.subtitle: We take the complexity out of digital transformation. From kickoff to launch in days, not months.

step1.title: Choose your service
step1.desc: Tell us what you need — analytics, automation, or AI. We'll scope the project and give you a clear quote with no surprises.

step2.title: We build & deliver
step2.desc: Our team gets to work immediately. You get updates, a staging environment, and can provide feedback throughout the process.

step3.title: You grow
step3.desc: Launch your new capabilities and watch your metrics improve. We provide ongoing support and iterations as you scale.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: Startup-friendly pricing that scales with you. No retainers required to get started.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: Perfect for startups needing a one-time build

platform.name: Platform
platform.desc: Self-serve access to all Pragmas tools

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Pragmas and how we work.

q1.q: How quickly can you deliver a project?
q1.a: Most Starter projects are delivered within 5-10 business days. Growth retainer clients get priority turnaround of 24-48 hours per request. Platform subscribers get immediate access to all templates and tools.

q2.q: What tech stack do you use?
q2.a: We work with the modern stack: Next.js, Supabase, n8n for automations, Metabase or custom React dashboards for analytics, and Anthropic Claude for AI features. We adapt to your existing stack where needed.

q3.q: Do I own the code and data?
q3.a: Absolutely. All deliverables are yours. Starter and Growth clients receive full source code. Your data stays in your infrastructure — we never store client data on our servers.

q4.q: Can I cancel my retainer anytime?
q4.a: Yes, no lock-in contracts. Cancel anytime with 30 days notice. We believe in earning your business every month with quality and speed.

cta.title: Ready to build smarter?
cta.subtitle: Join 100+ startups already using Pragmas to automate, analyze, and accelerate their growth.

footer.description: AI-powered tools and digital consultancy for startups and SMEs. Build faster, grow smarter.
